'''hapana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rms|rms]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rms|rms]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hapana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpænæth|hæpænæth]] || [[word:hæpænæj|hæpænæj]] || [[word:hæpænæsh|hæpænæsh]] || [[word:hæpænæ|hæpænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapapanath|hapapanath]] || [[word:hapapanaj|hapapanaj]] || [[word:hapapanash|hapapanash]] || [[word:hapapana|hapapana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapanath|hapanath]] || [[word:hapanaj|hapanaj]] || [[word:hapanash|hapanash]] || [[word:hapana|hapana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapafnafth|hapafnafth]] || [[word:hapafnafj|hapafnafj]] || [[word:hapafnafsh|hapafnafsh]] || [[word:hapafnaf|hapafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapanatha|hapanatha]] || [[word:hapanaja|hapanaja]] || [[word:hapanasha|hapanasha]] || [[word:hapanaka|hapanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapanath|hapanath]] || [[word:hapanaj|hapanaj]] || [[word:hapanash|hapanash]] || [[word:hapana|hapana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapanathal|hapanathal]] || [[word:hapanajal|hapanajal]] || [[word:hapanashal|hapanashal]] || [[word:hapanakal|hapanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hapanaathatha|hapanaathatha]] || [[word:hapanaajaja|hapanaajaja]] || [[word:hapanaashasha|hapanaashasha]] || [[word:hapanaaka|hapanaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapanathan|hapanathan]] || [[word:hapanajan|hapanajan]] || [[word:hapanashan|hapanashan]] || [[word:hapanakan|hapanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapanathaoro|hapanathaoro]] || [[word:hapanajaoro|hapanajaoro]] || [[word:hapanashaoro|hapanashaoro]] || [[word:hapanakaoro|hapanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
